calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joseph Slagley for petitioner Arturo Leon Jimenez (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. No objections were raised.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition. The will dated April 20, 2018, was admitted to probate.

Arturo Leon Jimenez was appointed as Executor, with full IAEA authority. Bond was not required.

Michael Kasolas was appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for September 14, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Mar-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
